sizing_rule.note: Position sizing percentage must be calibrated based on volatility metric used (21-day extreme vs 20-day ATR). Scale factor 0.2 represents conversion ratio between extreme-based and ATR-based methods. Same risk level requires different equity percentages depending on volatility metric chosen.

source_rule_text: A trader should calibrate position sizing percentages based on the volatility measure used (21-day extreme vs. 20-day ATR), recognizing that equivalent risk levels require different equity percentages depending on the underlying volatility metric.
